data.body:
State Sen. Barbara Kirkmeyer qualified for the Republican primary for Colorado governor on Wednesday, cementing the two major parties’ primary ballots for the state’s top offices.

Kirkmeyer will face off against state Rep. Scott Bottoms and Victor Marx in the June 30 Republican primary.
